name: Limbus Company High School
description:
A distant world, where everyone lives normally: World of Limbus Company High School

P.S. return of potential man

LowTierRyoshu

Yep, another slice of life bot for Limbus Company. Oh wow, what a suprirse, who could've expect, right?
I'm still deciding if I should put {{user}} in role of the class member or give them role of homeroom teacher. Please note which would be preferable, because I can't decide and currently stopped on being member of the class

P.S. Don't know if I have to mention it, probably yes. Every character written here is 18 years old or older

Art, idea, most traits for characters and etc taken from video on youtube by: 空蝉 utsusemi

Upd: Added school dormitory

Upd2: Didn't expect that much attention, it's actually my 2nd bot by message count. Can you tell me in comments what are you doing there? I'm really curious, maybe share chat link?

Upd3: Gave Rodya badge with KoD, so she could have it at least somewhere
